text: The medical advisory board and its members shall not be held liable in any action or proceeding on account of any recommendation or report submitted to the commissioner pursuant to this article.

# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 5
#### Article 21
##### § 545 — Immunity

The medical advisory board and its members shall not be held liable in any action or proceeding on account of any recommendation or report submitted to the commissioner pursuant to this article.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: The medical advisory board and its members shall not be held liable in any action or proceeding on account of any recommendation or report submitted to the commissioner pursuant to this article.
